summary: Started M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001 after M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-FIXTURE-001 closed in main. The task must make the player-facing map and route decision surface consume explicit topology-backed read models instead of deriving map meaning from rectangular grids, hex/lattice coordinates, sequential ids, centroids, bounding boxes, or renderer-only guessed connections.

tests_run.result: Main was clean before creating branch codex/m7-map-topology-client.
M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-CLIENT-001 selected as dependency-ready after fixture closure.

decisions.decision: Start client topology task rather than reopening content lock. Content lock remains blocked until client topology and validation complete.
Writer is instructed to consume accepted read-model/protocol surfaces only and block if protocol/sim-core/content-source changes become necessary.

risks.summary: Client rendering may accidentally reintroduce regular grid authority through hit testing, centroid links, or list/map focus; tests and screenshots must guard against that.
Formal M7 content lock remains blocked.

requested_action: Implement topology-backed player map and route decision surface within allowed paths, then return REVIEW handoff to systems_architect.
